name: Liver, Black Beans, and Snow Pea Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chicken livers, trimmed and sliced
2 tablespoons Fermented black beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil over high heat in a large wok.
Add liver; stir fry for 3-5 minutes, or until liver is browned but still pink on the inside. Remove from wok and set aside.
2. Reduce heat to medium. Heat remaining oil in the wok.
Add black beans, garlic, and ginger. Stir fry for 1 minute.
3. Add soy sauce, sherry, broth, and green onions.
Bring mixture to a boil. Return liver to the wok; stir until sauce coats the liver and liver is heated through.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
